<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by vue-docgen-cli — do not edit. Source: src/components/CnXwikiTab/CnXwikiTab.vue -->

### Props

| Name               | Type     | Required | Default                                                                                             | Description                                                                                 |
| ------------------ | -------- | -------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `objectId`         | `string` | ✓        | —                                                                                                   | Parent object id.                                                                           |
| `register`         | `string` |          | `''`                                                                                                | OpenRegister register id (slug or uuid).                                                    |
| `schema`           | `string` |          | `''`                                                                                                | OpenRegister schema id (slug or uuid).                                                      |
| `apiBase`          | `string` |          | `'/apps/openregister/api'`                                                                          | Base API URL.                                                                               |
| `linkPlaceholder`  | `string` |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Paste an XWiki page URL or type a Space.Page path')`                  | Pre-translated placeholder/label for the link input.                                        |
| `linkLabel`        | `string` |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Link page')`                                                          | Pre-translated label for the "Link page" button.                                            |
| `unlinkLabel`      | `string` |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Unlink page')`                                                        | Pre-translated aria-label for the per-row "Unlink page" button.                             |
| `noPagesLabel`     | `string` |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'No linked articles')`                                                 | Pre-translated empty-state label when no pages are linked.                                  |
| `reconnectLabel`   | `string` |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'XWiki connection needs attention — re-connect it in OpenConnector.')` | Pre-translated banner shown when the OpenConnector source's credentials need re-connecting. |
| `unavailableLabel` | `string` |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'XWiki is not reachable right now.')`                                  | Pre-translated banner shown when XWiki / OpenConnector is unreachable.                      |

### Events

| Name       | Payload | Description                                                                                                                  |
| ---------- | ------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `linked`   | —       | Emitted after a page is linked and the list refreshes. Payload: the reference (URL or `Space.Page` path) that was submitted. |
| `unlinked` | —       | Emitted after a page's pairing is removed (the page itself is NOT deleted in XWiki). Payload: the page reference id.         |
